name: Riverside Community
description_short: Riverside Community FCU is a member-owned credit union serving Marion and Grant County, Indiana, offering auto loans, home loans, personal loans, and deposit products with NCUA insurance protection.
description_long:
Riverside Community Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union headquartered in Marion, Indiana, with an additional branch in Gas City. The credit union has been serving the local community and operates under federal regulation by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). As a cooperative financial institution, it prioritizes member value over shareholder profits, reinvesting earnings back into competitive rates and service improvements.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans, home loans, personal loans, recreational vehicle loans, checking accounts, savings accounts, and certificates of deposit. Members can access online banking services and benefit from access to the CO-OP ATM network for convenient cash withdrawals. Current promotional rates advertised on their website include auto loans as low as 5.99%, personal loans starting at 9.99%, and recreational loans from 7.59%, though actual rates depend on creditworthiness, vehicle age, and loan terms.

Riverside Community FCU distinguishes itself through its local community focus, operating two physical branches within Grant County to serve members directly. The credit union actively communicates with members about fraud threats, providing detailed scam notices on their homepage about text message schemes and fraudulent phone calls impersonating credit union representatives. They also maintain transparent security messaging, emphasizing that legitimate representatives never solicit personal information via unsolicited calls.

As a federally insured institution, member deposits are protected up to $250,000 through NCUA insurance, providing the same safety guarantees as FDIC-insured banks. However, prospective members should note that membership eligibility may be restricted to residents of Marion and Grant County areas, and the credit union's loan rates and terms depend on credit performance—not all applicants will qualify for advertised rates.
services: Wire transfers and electronic funds transfer
pros: NCUA deposit insurance protection up to $250,000 per account
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.99% APR
CO-OP ATM network access for nationwide cash withdrawals
Two physical branch locations in Marion and Gas City for local member service
Online home banking platform available for remote account management
Proactive fraud prevention communication and member security alerts
Full-service offerings including auto, home, personal, and recreational loans plus deposit products
cons: Membership eligibility likely restricted to Marion and Grant County residents only
Loan rates are variable based on credit performance—advertised rates are minimums, not guaranteed
Limited geographic footprint with only two branch locations
Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility requirements or field of membership boundaries
No mention of mobile app availability or mobile banking beyond 'online banking'
best_for: Marion and Grant County residents seeking local community banking with personalized service
Borrowers with good-to-excellent credit looking for competitive auto and home loan rates
Members prioritizing safety and NCUA insurance protection over for-profit bank operations
diagnosis: Riverside Community FCU is best for residents of Marion or Grant County, Indiana, who value community-based banking, competitive loan rates, and NCUA insurance protection. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is geographically restricted, and advertised rates require good credit—actual approved rates may be significantly higher for applicants with fair or poor credit profiles.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Riverside Community — Credit Union in Marion, IN | CreditDoc
meta_description: Riverside Community — NCUA-insured credit union in Marion, IN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
